keyPoints: Armor components defined as observable workflow features (discipline prompts, daily rituals, verify outputs).
Longitudinal study anchor: 6–12 month assessment of AI-dependency trajectories and judgment preservation.
Pre-registration, multi-metric outcomes, and domain-diverse sampling.
Governance scaffolds—HITL, TEVV, audit trails—as core armor design principles.
Primary metrics: AI-Dependency Index, Judgment-Preservation Score, and Output Verification Rate.
Moderation analyses for task type, AI error rate, and user expertise to address domain variance.
Actionable implications for designers and knowledge workers to sustain taste, judgment, and responsible decision-making.
